scripts.validate: bun run lint:fix && bun run typecheck && bun run build
scripts.validate:ci: bun run lint && bun run typecheck && bun run build && bun run generate:check
scripts.generate: cargo test --features full -- generate_ts_client --exact && biome check --write --unsafe packages/client/src/generated.ts crates/yauth/bindings/
scripts.generate:check: bun generate && git diff --exit-code packages/client/src/generated.ts crates/yauth/bindings/
